content: Self-Refine’s single-perspective iterative refinement pipeline can be augmented by integrating multiple inconsistent problem-solving perspectives from modern LLM self-reflection mechanisms, creating a hybrid framework that retains Self-Refine’s core advantage of no additional training or supervision while eliminating its blind spot of single-view feedback bias. This hybrid approach would let an LLM first critique its own initial output from multiple conflicting framing angles, then iteratively refine the output based on aggregated cross-perspective feedback, all without labeled data or extra model training.
